mapper.insert: INSERT INTO community_posts (user_id, category, title, content) VALUES (#{userId}, #{category}, #{title}, #{content})
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, category, title, content, view_count, like_count, comment_count, is_pinned, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM community_posts WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1

SELECT p.id, p.category, p.title, p.content, p.view_count, p.like_count, p.comment_count, p.is_pinned, p.user_id AS author_id, u.name AS author_name, ( #{userId} IS NOT NULL AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM community_likes WHERE post_id = p.id AND user_id = #{userId} ) ) AS is_liked, p.created_at, p.updated_at FROM community_posts p JOIN users u ON u.id = p.user_id AND u.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE p.id = #{id} AND p.deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM community_posts WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
AND category = #{category}
mapper.update: UPDATE community_posts SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE community_posts SET deleted_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE community_posts SET view_count = view_count + 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE community_posts SET is_pinned = NOT is_pinned, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO community_comments (post_id, user_id, content) VALUES (#{postId}, #{userId}, #{content})
mapper.select: SELECT id, post_id, user_id, content, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM community_comments WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1

SELECT c.id, c.post_id, c.user_id AS author_id, u.name AS author_name, c.content, c.created_at FROM community_comments c JOIN users u ON u.id = c.user_id AND u.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE c.post_id = #{postId} AND c.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY c.created_at ASC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM community_comments WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE community_comments SET deleted_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE community_posts SET comment_count = comment_count + 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{postId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE community_posts SET comment_count = GREATEST(comment_count - 1, 0), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{postId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO community_likes (post_id, user_id) VALUES (#{postId}, #{userId}) ON CONFLICT (post_id, user_id) DO NOTHING
mapper.select: SELECT like_count FROM community_posts WHERE id = #{postId}
